insight: Boss 6.x lazily captures vanilla attribute defaults on first spawn of each EntityType (for Folia compatibility). After a server restart, the Settings → Attributes menu shows empty for any non-PLAYER boss whose EntityType has not spawned yet. Saved overrides in the yaml `Attributes:` section are NOT lost and still apply on spawn. Workaround: run `/boss spawn <name>` once, then reopen the menu. See Boss.initDefaultAttributes() and captureDefaultAttributes() around lines 870-930.
